productDisplayName: Puma Men Jiff Black Flip Flops
description: For those who don't want the hassle of tying laces, chill out in style and revel in comfort with these black and red Jiff funky flip-flops from puma. With its textured footbed and strong grippy outsole, the journey in this footwear will be an assured awesome one.UpperSynthetic and suede criss cross straps for superior durabilityToe separator for enhanced grip and comfortTextured rubber footbed for enhanced gripContrast colours and puma logo on the strap for styleOutsoleTPU outsole with multi directional wave-like grooves and Puma logo embossed above the heel for maximum suction, grip and traction  CareWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
